response.global_analysis: Audio for 'Sepia' matches the burnt-in lyrics and the reference JSON phonetics. For 'Bansanka', the audio and on-screen text confirm the song title and artist, but the performance uses an upbeat arrangement with lyrics ('ハレハレレ...') that differ from the reference JSON's ballad-style verses. I am ignoring the mismatched JSON lyrics for 'Bansanka' and following the burnt-in text and audio. Discarded leftover JSON lyrics. Timing is strictly aligned to vocal audio.

subtitles.original: どうか神様 教えてくれますか
subtitles.english: Pray tell me, God

subtitles.original: 言葉少なに 貴方に捧ぐ
subtitles.english: I give to you silently

subtitles.original: 今に消えてしまいそうなこの命を
subtitles.english: My life that's about to burn out

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 愛おしいセピア色した
subtitles.english: Ah, and these sepia-toned sights

subtitles.original: 何より大事なこの景色を
subtitles.english: They're most precious of all

subtitles.original: もう少し見ていたいよな
subtitles.english: I wish I could see them a bit more...

subtitles.english: I wonder why I came to be

subtitles.english: Ah, such beautiful, youthful days

subtitles.english: But I'd have to be a little stronger first

subtitles.english: Hale-hale-le, now dance and dance

subtitles.english: Play in love and longing, sing like the cherry blossoms
